title: Banking & Technology Recruiter / Talent Acquisition (Temporary Contract)
description:
Employment Type (MOM CEI License Mandatory)

Fixed-Term Temp Contract (6 to 12 months) (High performers will be considered for a permanent position)
Full-time | Singapore

Overview

We are seeking a Temporary Recruiter to support high-volume recruitment activities for technology and banking roles. This role is execution-heavy and suited for a recruiter who is comfortable with mass hiring, back-to-back candidate calls, and fast turnaround environments.

You will be responsible for end-to-end recruitment execution, from sourcing and screening to interview coordination and candidate matching, while ensuring compliance with MOM regulations and HR best practices.

Key Responsibilities

Recruitment & Sourcing

  • Source, screen, and build candidate pipelines across multiple roles

  • Conduct initial candidate screening via calls and virtual interviews

  • Perform high-volume / mass recruitment, including back-to-back candidate calls

  • Match candidates accurately to relevant job openings based on skills, experience, and role requirements

Candidate Management

  • Schedule interviews between candidates and hiring managers

  • Prepare and maintain candidate profiles, including resumes, screening notes, and application details

  • Collect and verify job application information in a structured and compliant manner

  • Provide timely follow-ups and manage candidate expectations throughout the hiring process

Process & Compliance

  • Ensure recruitment activities comply with MOM regulations and Employment Act requirements

  • Apply basic HR policy knowledge during candidate screening and advisory

  • Maintain proper documentation and records in ATS or internal tracking systems

Requirements

Mandatory

  • CEI (Certified Employment Intermediary) – MOM Licensed

  • Prior experience in recruitment, staffing, or talent acquisition (agency or in-house)

Technical & Domain Knowledge

  • Basic to intermediate understanding of technology and/or banking terminology
    (e.g. IT roles, systems, banking operations, compliance, finance functions)

  • Ability to quickly understand job requirements and “speak the language” of candidates

Work Style & Attributes

  • Comfortable with mass recruitment and high call volumes

  • Flexible and adaptable in a fast-paced environment

  • Willing and able to work longer hours when hiring demand peaks

  • Strong communication skills and phone confidence

Compliance Awareness

  • Working knowledge of HR policies, MOM guidelines, and recruitment compliance

  • Able to apply fair hiring and ethical recruitment practices consistently

Ideal For

  • Recruiters between roles seeking a 6–12 month contract

  • Agency recruiters experienced in volume hiring

  • Individuals comfortable with execution-focused, results-driven recruitment work

postedCompany.description:
D L Resources Pte Ltd, established on 5 January 1996, is a Singapore-based Information Technology and Human Capital Services provider. We specialize in delivering end-to-end IT professional services and agency-employed contract staffing solutions to a diverse client base, including leading banks, financial institutions, and multinational corporations.


EA License No: 24C2333


Add us on our recruitment team linkedin profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dlresourcesrecruitment/
